markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Deep dive on Netwrix products and new strategic positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/bNFnyp1p9MmjhjJ_wNSuyFzbhLrrreq9?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Strategy:** Netwrix is unifying its portfolio under two pillars—Data Security and Identity Security—to solve the "attackers log in, not break in" problem, replacing the ineffective six-solution bundle approach.](https://fathom.video/share/bNFnyp1p9MmjhjJ_wNSuyFzbhLrrreq9?tab=summary&timestamp=2740.0)
  - [**Product Focus:** The SaaS platform, OneSecure, is the future and primary demo tool. Its on-prem predecessor, Auditor, remains key for compliance-heavy clients and the Varonis takeout play.](https://fathom.video/share/bNFnyp1p9MmjhjJ_wNSuyFzbhLrrreq9?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
  - [**Content Opportunity:** OneSecure's \~80 reports are a direct source of customer pain points, creating a high-volume "how-to" content strategy to drive organic traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/bNFnyp1p9MmjhjJ_wNSuyFzbhLrrreq9?tab=summary&timestamp=1486.0)
  - [**Cross-Sell Challenge:** A low cross-sell rate (e.g., 9.5% Auditor → Endpoint Protector) is a major focus. GrowthX will analyze multi-product customer data to define a successful ICP and replicate their journey.](https://fathom.video/share/bNFnyp1p9MmjhjJ_wNSuyFzbhLrrreq9?tab=summary&timestamp=3753.0)

## Topics

### Challenge: Fragmented Portfolio & Low Cross-Sell

  - [Netwrix's portfolio of \~18 acquired products is fragmented, with low cross-sell rates.](https://fathom.video/share/bNFnyp1p9MmjhjJ_wNSuyFzbhLrrreq9?tab=summary&timestamp=2116.0)
  - [**Example:** Only 9.5% of Auditor customers also own Endpoint Protector.](https://fathom.video/share/bNFnyp1p9MmjhjJ_wNSuyFzbhLrrreq9?tab=summary&timestamp=3473.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** Most customers are on-prem, making product integration difficult.](https://fathom.video/share/bNFnyp1p9MmjhjJ_wNSuyFzbhLrrreq9?tab=summary&timestamp=2138.0)
  - [**Previous Attempt:** Six solution bundles failed because they were not integrated, and sellers struggled to position them.](https://fathom.video/share/bNFnyp1p9MmjhjJ_wNSuyFzbhLrrreq9?tab=summary&timestamp=3051.0)

### Solution: New Unified Strategy

  - [**Core Problem:** Attackers compromise identities to log in and steal data. Data security and identity security are often treated as separate disciplines.](https://fathom.video/share/bNFnyp1p9MmjhjJ_wNSuyFzbhLrrreq9?tab=summary&timestamp=2764.0)
  - [**Netwrix's Differentiator:** Unifies these two pillars to provide a holistic solution.](https://fathom.video/share/bNFnyp1p9MmjhjJ_wNSuyFzbhLrrreq9?tab=summary&timestamp=2845.0)
  - [**Ideal Customer Profile (ICP):**](https://fathom.video/share/bNFnyp1p9MmjhjJ_wNSuyFzbhLrrreq9?tab=summary&timestamp=2592.0)
      - [**Microsoft Shop:** Uses Active Directory (AD) or Entra ID as the identity control plane.](https://fathom.video/share/bNFnyp1p9MmjhjJ_wNSuyFzbhLrrreq9?tab=summary&timestamp=2603.0)
      - [**Heterogeneous Environment:** Has non-Microsoft data sources (e.g., NetApp, S3) where Microsoft's native tools are ineffective.](https://fathom.video/share/bNFnyp1p9MmjhjJ_wNSuyFzbhLrrreq9?tab=summary&timestamp=2631.0)
  - [**New Website Navigation:** Will reflect the two pillars, with a "Platform" nav for categories and a "Solutions" nav for 45+ specific use cases.](https://fathom.video/share/bNFnyp1p9MmjhjJ_wNSuyFzbhLrrreq9?tab=summary&timestamp=2940.0)

### Product Deep Dive: OneSecure (SaaS) vs. Auditor (On-Prem)

  - [**OneSecure (SaaS):** The future of the company.](https://fathom.video/share/bNFnyp1p9MmjhjJ_wNSuyFzbhLrrreq9?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
      - [**Focus:** Balanced mix of security and compliance.](https://fathom.video/share/bNFnyp1p9MmjhjJ_wNSuyFzbhLrrreq9?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)
      - [**Key Features:**](https://fathom.video/share/bNFnyp1p9MmjhjJ_wNSuyFzbhLrrreq9?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
          - [**Risk Assessment:** Advanced version has \>200 security checks with AI-based remediation recommendations.](https://fathom.video/share/bNFnyp1p9MmjhjJ_wNSuyFzbhLrrreq9?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
          - [**Reporting:** \~80 predefined reports across Activity, Compliance, and Risk categories.](https://fathom.video/share/bNFnyp1p9MmjhjJ_wNSuyFzbhLrrreq9?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
          - [**Sensitive Data Discovery:** Identifies and classifies sensitive data in SharePoint Online and Windows File Servers.](https://fathom.video/share/bNFnyp1p9MmjhjJ_wNSuyFzbhLrrreq9?tab=summary&timestamp=1210.0)
          - [**Copilot Security:** Reports on Copilot interactions and sensitive data access to enable secure AI rollout.](https://fathom.video/share/bNFnyp1p9MmjhjJ_wNSuyFzbhLrrreq9?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)
  - [**Netwrix Auditor (On-Prem):** The legacy flagship product.](https://fathom.video/share/bNFnyp1p9MmjhjJ_wNSuyFzbhLrrreq9?tab=summary&timestamp=946.0)
      - [**Focus:** Primarily a compliance tool.](https://fathom.video/share/bNFnyp1p9MmjhjJ_wNSuyFzbhLrrreq9?tab=summary&timestamp=946.0)
      - [**Maturity:** \~20 years old and more feature-rich for compliance reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/bNFnyp1p9MmjhjJ_wNSuyFzbhLrrreq9?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
      - [**Strategic Role:** Supports the Varonis takeout play by offering a stable on-prem alternative to Varonis's forced cloud migration.](https://fathom.video/share/bNFnyp1p9MmjhjJ_wNSuyFzbhLrrreq9?tab=summary&timestamp=3264.0)

### Content Strategy Opportunities

  - [**"How-To" Content:** OneSecure's \~80 reports are a direct source of customer pain points, creating a high-volume content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/bNFnyp1p9MmjhjJ_wNSuyFzbhLrrreq9?tab=summary&timestamp=1486.0)
      - [**Examples:** "How to see permissions that were changed," "How to export a report of configurations."](https://fathom.video/share/bNFnyp1p9MmjhjJ_wNSuyFzbhLrrreq9?tab=summary&timestamp=1572.0)
  - [**Sensitive Data Focus:** Content can be built around specific data types (e.g., CAD files, source code) and their associated risks.](https://fathom.video/share/bNFnyp1p9MmjhjJ_wNSuyFzbhLrrreq9?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)
  - [**Varonis Takeout Play:** A key strategic focus. GrowthX will analyze Netwrix's internal competitive docs to create content targeting Varonis's on-prem customers.](https://fathom.video/share/bNFnyp1p9MmjhjJ_wNSuyFzbhLrrreq9?tab=summary&timestamp=3264.0)
  - [**Competitor Analysis:** Analyze content from competitors like ManageEngine to identify successful strategies and white space, without necessarily creating direct comparison pages.](https://fathom.video/share/bNFnyp1p9MmjhjJ_wNSuyFzbhLrrreq9?tab=summary&timestamp=3625.0)

      - [Share the slide deck detailing Netwrix's acquisition history.](https://fathom.video/share/bNFnyp1p9MmjhjJ_wNSuyFzbhLrrreq9?tab=summary&timestamp=2490.0)
      - [Share Varonis takeout play competitive docs.](https://fathom.video/share/bNFnyp1p9MmjhjJ_wNSuyFzbhLrrreq9?tab=summary&timestamp=3341.0)
      - [Share the OneDrive link in Slack for document uploads.](https://fathom.video/share/bNFnyp1p9MmjhjJ_wNSuyFzbhLrrreq9?tab=summary&timestamp=3362.0)
